name: Project Pino (Tokenized Structured Notes — DBS + SBI Digital Asset Holdings)

issuer.name: DBS Bank + SBI Digital Asset Holdings

regulator.name: Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) — Project Guardian framework

summary: Cross-border tokenized structured notes pilot under MAS Project Guardian. Demonstrated atomic settlement of tokenized fixed-income products between DBS (Singapore) and SBI Digital Asset Holdings (Japan). Used permissioned DLT with delivery-versus-payment settlement. Important precursor to wider cross-border tokenization corridors; one of the first concrete pilot demonstrations of Project Guardian's multi-jurisdiction interoperability ambitions.

sources.title: MAS Project Guardian cross-border pilots overview

underlying_asset: Tokenized structured notes with fixed-income payoffs; pilot scale rather than mass-market deployment.
reserve_composition: Standard structured note backing (issuer credit + reference asset performance).
secondary_market: Permissioned pilot — limited to participating institutions.
oracle_provider: Reference asset pricing per note design.
redemption_mechanism: Atomic DvP settlement at maturity per note terms.

timeline.event: DBS + SBI announce successful Project Pino pilot completion
Phase 2 expansion announced under broader Project Guardian
